data.title: Janus International Group to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI) based in Temple, Georgia, a prominent global manufacturer of self-storage, commercial, and industrial building solutions, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, before the market opens. The company's webcast and conference call discussing the results will occur on the same day at 10:00 a.m. ET. Investors and analysts can tune in to review the financial performance for the first quarter and engage in a Q&A session.

data.title: Early Immune Changes May Signal Increased Risk of Alzheimer's and Dementia
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in New York, it was reported that neutrophils, a type of white blood cell crucial for the immune system's initial response, increase in quantity during infection and inflammation. This surge alters the balance of neutrophils to other immune cells in the bloodstream.

data.title: Zephyr AI Appoints Dr. Lisa Eli as Chief Scientific Officer
data.description: Zephyr AI, Inc., based in McLean, Virginia, a prominent player in precision medicine utilizing artificial intelligence to expedite drug development, revealed the selection of Lisa Eli, PhD, as its Chief Scientific Officer. With a remarkable track record of more than two decades in translational medicine and precision oncology, Eli specializes in propelling biomarker-centered clinical advancements. Her proficiency encompasses steering comprehensive biomarker and diagnostic approaches throughout Phase 1-3 clinical trials.

data.title: STP Investment Services and CAPIS Launch Coordinated Outsourced Trading and Operations Model for Buy-Side Firms
data.description: A strategic partnership has been announced between STP Investment Services (STP) and CAPIS, based in West Chester, Pa. and Dallas, respectively. STP, a global provider of technology-driven investment operations, fund administration, and compliance solutions, will be teaming up with CAPIS, an institutional brokerage firm. This joint initiative aims to introduce an integrated outsourced model tailored for buy-side firms, combining trade execution and investment operations support. The collaboration is designed to provide a scalable solution for firms seeking growth without the need for additional internal expansion.

data.title: Fingerprint Releases New Analysis on Neobanks, BNPL and Fraud
data.description: A report titled "Scaling Trust in Digital Finance" was recently released by Fingerprint, a prominent player in device intelligence, based in Chicago. The study emphasizes a crucial turning point for neobanks, showcasing that digital-first entities are now prime targets for advanced fraud schemes. These fraudulent activities primarily involve AI-powered synthetic identities and sophisticated account takeover methods. Moreover, digital-first financial institutions are evolving from being alternative options to becoming the main banking partners for many consumers. The report points out a significant increase in the utilization of these institutions for various financial services.

data.title: CompassMSP Ends Critical Security Delays via Unified Platform Enhancements
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, CompassMSP has unveiled a significant enhancement of its cybersecurity services to address the crucial period between a breach being detected and a full investigation taking place. This gap allows cyberattackers to delete evidence, strengthen their control, and escalate a contained threat into a potentially business-changing incident. The expansion provides a unified platform integrating threat detection, digital forensics, and incident response to combat this threat effectively. The company aims to minimize this high-risk phase in cyberattacks and bolster defense mechanisms for businesses.

data.title: Versiti Clinical Trials Services Partners with 4D Path to Accelerate Personalized Cancer Treatment Development
data.description: In a recent announcement, Versiti Clinical Trials Services (VCTS) has forged a strategic partnership with 4D Path, aiming to integrate innovative treatment predictive biomarker technology into cancer research efforts. This joint venture introduces 4D Path's advanced Q-Plasia OncoReader (QPOR™) platform to aid researchers in the development of personalized cancer therapies with life-saving potential. Through this collaboration, pharmaceutical firms and clinical research organizations partnered with VCTS now have access to these cutting-edge tools, empowering them with insights on individual cancer responses.

data.title: Ziff Davis to Participate in One Investor Conference in May
data.description: Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD) has confirmed its attendance at the J.P. Morgan 54th Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 18, 2026, at 8:25 am (ET). The event will take place at The Westin Boston Seaport District in Boston, MA. For those unable to attend in person, a webcast will be available at https://jpmorgan.metameetings.net/events/tmc26/sessions/318680-ziff-davis-inc/webcast/public. Ziff Davis, a vertical media company, will be participating in this conference.

data.title: Filigran Report: 90% of Financial Sector Breaches Driven by Financial Gain as AI and Supply Chain Threats Escalate
data.description: In Paris today, the European open-source threat management company Filigran unveiled their report titled "Cyberthreats in the Financial Sector" which delves into the changing threat environment encountered by financial institutions alongside the regulatory changes shaping their response protocols. Notably, the report reveals that a staggering 90% of breaches impacting financial entities in 2025 were driven by financial motives, with data breaches constituting 64% of all incidents and ransomware attacks making up the remaining 36%. This indicates a significant financial risk faced by such institutions.

data.title: Rockwell Automation to Report Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: Milwaukee-based company Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, before the market opens. The results will be available on the Rockwell Investor Relations website at www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html. A conference call discussing these results is scheduled for 7:30 a.m. CDT on May 5. The call will be available via audio webcast on the Rockwell Automation Investor Relations website.

data.title: Cincoze DIN-Rail Embedded Computer Wins 2026 iF Design Award
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, Cincoze, a rugged edge computing brand, has been honored with the prestigious 2026 iF Design Award for their MD-3000 DIN-Rail embedded computer. This product is a part of the Machine Computing - MAGNET product line and is specifically designed for the machine level in smart manufacturing environments. The MD-3000 stands out for its exceptional performance, flexible scalability, compact dimensions, and DIN-Rail mounting capabilities. It serves as a stable and efficient computing platform for various applications in the manufacturing sector. This recognition highlights the innovative design and seamless application integration of the MD-3000 in catering to the technological needs of the industry.

data.title: Pipedrive ranked #1 in Lead Management and Small Business CRM by SoftwareReviews
data.description: Pipedrive, a user-friendly CRM solution tailored for small and medium-sized businesses, has recently received high accolades from SoftwareReviews. According to verified user feedback, Pipedrive has secured top positions in both the Lead Management and Customer Relationship Management (CRM) categories. The latest rankings reveal that Pipedrive has claimed the #1 position in Lead Management with a score of 9.0, and also #1 in CRM for Small Businesses with the same score. Additionally, the platform has been ranked #3 in CRM for Midmarket with a score of 9.1. These rankings were determined based on direct feedback from verified users.
